mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, full_name, phone, address, role, deleted) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{fullName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{role}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, full_name = #{fullName}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
